narrative:
Green Creek C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 632 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
